title: stelis juxta
intro: Stelis juxta, also known as the False Pogonia or Pogonia juxta, is a terrestrial orchid species found in the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis juxta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis juxta include teas and infusions, which are typically made by steeping the plant's roots in hot water for medicinal use.
